color: rgb(184, 196, 214) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Independent layers: if one fails, the next holds.
L1 and L2 share the engine. Defense = sum of layers.
